versioning_decision: Bumped the v1.2 specification document from 1.2.4 to 1.2.5. Although Section 8.1 says minor versions are for backward-compatible additions, this repository versions in-file v1.2 revisions with a third component in the 1.2.1 through 1.2.4 history table and starts a new file for minor protocol lines. Section 14 also keeps v1.3 as a future proposal bucket. Embedded context content is backward-compatible and all new fields are optional, so it is recorded as 1.2.5 and noted as a candidate for consolidation into a future v1.3 file.

canary.codeword_location: Plain grep for the codeword across test-bundles/interop-level-0/ hits only test-queries.json; decoding embedded-content-canary.md context item embedded-canary-context content_b64 and grepping the decoded bytes hits the canary sentence.

findings: The embedded canary payload decodes to 55 bytes and matches the declared SHA-256 hash.
Plain grep containment is intentionally limited to test-queries.json; the carrying document reveals the canary fact only after base64 decoding.
deliberately_not_done: Did not touch TEZ_INTERROGATION_PROTOCOL.md, schemas/tip-*.json, test-bundles/interop-level-3/, or test-bundles/tip-compliance/.
Did not make embedded-content canary queries mandatory for implementations that do not support embedded content.
